success.description: True if AND only if: README found + SKILL.md (or strong Skill signal) confirmed + skill_path determinate + valid name + non-empty owner/repo + confidence ∈ {high,medium}. False on any failure mode.

name.description: Sanitized Skill name. Must match [A-Za-z0-9_.-]+, cannot start with . or -, cannot contain .., max 64 chars. Empty string allowed only when success=false.

owner.description: GitHub owner segment. Required for install; empty only when success=false AND REPO_URL was unreachable.

repo.description: GitHub repo segment. Required for install; empty only when success=false AND REPO_URL was unreachable.

skill_path.description: In-repo directory path containing SKILL.md (relative to repo root, no leading/trailing slash). Empty string ('') means Skill is at repo root. Must be determinate when success=true.

skill_md_filename.description: Exact-case filename of the Skill manifest. Defaults to 'SKILL.md' — only set otherwise when the repo unconventionally uses lowercase.

description.description: Short one-line description for marketplace card preview. Source: SKILL.md frontmatter description > SKILL.md body first paragraph > GitHub repo description. Empty string allowed (UI degrades gracefully).

summary.description: Longer 'what this Skill teaches Claude to do' blurb. Source: SKILL.md body first ~200 chars > README first paragraph. Empty string allowed.

notes.description: Provenance + caveats (≤ 280 chars). On success: which Step 1d evidence + which Step 2 rule + description source. On failure: specific blocker. Always required, never empty.

confidence.description: high = SKILL.md confirmed + frontmatter description used. medium = Skill confirmed via keyword or install command but not direct SKILL.md fetch. low = Step 2 Rule 4/5 OR last-resort description OR repo type ambiguous. success=true REQUIRES high or medium.
